surfaces.label: Admin Dashboard
surfaces.purpose: Show system-generated, editor-created, editor-returned and unresolved content streams for Admin review.
surfaces.input_source: AG26A routing model, AG25Z readiness matrix and unresolved register

surfaces.label: System Generated Content Inbox
surfaces.purpose: Receive AI/system-generated article or module candidates first for Admin review.

surfaces.label: Editor Created Candidate Inbox
surfaces.purpose: Receive independently created Editor article candidates for Admin review.
surfaces.input_source: AG26A editor create/edit model and routing policy

surfaces.label: Editor Returned Content Inbox
surfaces.purpose: Receive edited articles returned by Editor after Admin assignment.
surfaces.input_source: AG26A routing model and editor review state model

surfaces.label: Admin Review Detail View
surfaces.purpose: Review article body, references, attribution, object/tool requirements, card/SEO and layout readiness.
surfaces.input_source: AG25Z readiness matrix, AG26A tool browser, correction and preview-submit models

surfaces.label: Assign to Editor Panel
surfaces.purpose: Forward system-generated or existing content to Editor when Admin finds editing is required.

surfaces.label: Admin Tool Approval Panel
surfaces.purpose: Approve or reject proposed article tools, object generation needs and cost-sensitive preparation steps.
surfaces.input_source: AG26A auto-article tool inventory and object generation model

surfaces.label: Admin Reference and Attribution Review
surfaces.purpose: Review source status, references, image/object credits and editorial verification flags.

surfaces.label: Admin Final Publish Control Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan Admin-only final publish authority while keeping runtime publishing blocked in AG26B.
surfaces.input_source: AG26 approval gate and AG26A routing model

surfaces.label: Admin Audit and History Panel
surfaces.purpose: Plan status history for Admin decisions, Editor assignments, returned edits, holds and publish clearance.
